A special microfibre combined with polyurethane resin allows for increased efficiency, while this blend of materials provides wear resistance. Microfiber can absorb up to seven times its weight. This amount of dirt is then very easily released when wringing later. The Surtep microfiber duster gets rid of the entire volume of water absorbed, whereas cotton, for example, still retains 30% of the water. The special microfibre material is very easy to wring, dries quickly and effectively prevents the growth of microorganisms. Perfect cleanliness can be achieved in a single stroke, saving cleaning time. However, it is important to ensure that the Surtep microfiber duster is always clean before use. items.raw_desc: Betét SIXTOL Trailer Ball 1 Vonóhorog biztonsági golyó:The SIXTOL TRAILER BALL 1 is a practical protective element designed for use in combination with lockable towing coupling locks. The insert is inserted directly into the trailer head and prevents the trailer from locking onto the towing pin, effectively preventing unwanted or unauthorised attachment of the trailer to the vehicle. It also facilitates the process of safely locking the clutch before the actual locking, as it helps to pre-set the position of the clutch in the closed position without being connected to the car. Due to its universal size, the insert is compatible with most common outboard joints.  Durable ABS plastic material ensures long life and ease of use. A betét kiváló nedvszívó képességének és lágy, puha felületének köszönhetően egész napra a lehető legjobb légáteresztő képességet és kényelmet biztosítja.
